data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for MoonLake Immunotherapeutics investors who suffered significant losses. Contact James Wilson for legal options.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, urges investors who have experienced substantial losses in MoonLake to reach out to him for a consultation regarding their options. If you have suffered notable losses in MoonLake stock or options and wish to explore your legal avenues, please contact him directly to discuss your situation.

data.title: FDA grants RMAT designation to Avobis Bio's AVB-114 for Crohn's fistulas, setting stage for phase III trial planning.
data.description: Avobis Bio LLC, a clinical stage company based in Newark, Delaware, revealed that they have received designation from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) on October 3, 2025. This designation marks a crucial step for the company as it paves the way for intensive planning of a phase III trial. Avobis Bio LLC specializes in the development of implantable cell therapies. This recent development signifies a significant milestone in the company's journey towards gaining FDA approval for their innovative therapies. This news indicates that Avobis Bio LLC is gearing up to progress towards conducting a crucial phase III trial to further assess the efficacy and safety of their therapies, with a particular focus on seeking FDA approval. The approval from the FDA is a vital step in the process as it signifies recognition of the company's advancements in the field of implantable cell therapies. This milestone highlights the progress and potential impact of Avobis Bio LLC in the realm of medical advancements and signifies the company's commitment to bringing innovative solutions to the market.

data.title: REEDS Jewelers unveils Downton Abbey fine jewelry collection, inspired by movie "The Grand Finale".
data.description: In Wilmington, North Carolina, on October 3, 2025, REEDS Jewelers unveils the Downton Abbey by Reeds Jewelers: The Grand Finale fine jewelry collection. This collection pays homage to the newest feature film of the beloved franchise, Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale. The jewelry line showcases elegance and timeless style inspired by the acclaimed series.

data.title: Bitcoin hits $121,000, analysts predict positive returns for BTC and Ethereum in Q4. Target set at $140,000-$160,000 but $118,000 key support.
data.description: Bitcoin reached a high of $121,000 on Friday morning, sparking optimism for positive returns in the final quarter of the year for both Bitcoin and Ethereum. Trader Smiley Capital noted that prices above $120,000 may indicate a distribution zone for 2023 buyers, but still has a target range of $140,000–$160,000. However, a drop below the key support level of $118,000 could negate this bullish outlook. Ethereum's performance continues to be closely tied to Bitcoin's movements. The complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: UNISORB to showcase precision performance solutions for machinery installations at MT Southeast 2025.(org:98)
data.description: UNISORB Installation Solutions, based in JACKSON, Mich., announced on Oct. 3, 2025, its involvement in MT Southeast 2025, a top regional trade exhibition. The company specializes in providing precision-engineered installation solutions that enhance machine functionality and operational efficiency in various manufacturing sectors. This participation underscores UNISORB's commitment to driving performance and excellence in the industry.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates EA, MRUS, VECO for violations; concerns about federal securities laws breach.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a firm specializing in investor rights, announced an investigation into various companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties to shareholders. Specifically, Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) is under scrutiny for its sale practices. This move comes amidst growing concerns regarding corporate governance and adherence to regulations in the financial markets. Shareholders across companies are vigilant, with a focus on protecting their investments and ensuring fair treatment.These actions highlight the importance of transparency and accountability in the corporate sector.
US House Speaker Johnson: We can work on healthcare subsidies in October.

data.title: Solarea Bio has a new CEO - Catherine Balsam-Schwaber. Plans for Bondia™ launch in Oct 2025 for menopausal bone health.
data.description: Catherine Balsam-Schwaber is set to apply her expertise in scaling mission-focused health firms to Solarea Bio's innovative products for healthy aging. The company's groundbreaking solution, Bondia™, a unique synbiotic medical food tailored for menopausal bone health, will be launched commercially in October 2025. This launch aligns with the company's vision for promoting well-being and marks a significant step in catering to the health needs of the aging population.

data.title: Acuity Inc. beats Q4 earnings with EPS of $5.20 vs est. $4.84. Sales at $1.21B vs est. $1.23B. Shares down 0.6% to $360.70.
data.description: Acuity Inc. (NYSE: AYI) delivered a strong fourth-quarter performance, surpassing expectations with an adjusted EPS of $5.20, higher than the projected $4.84. The company achieved a 17.1% year-over-year increase in quarterly net sales, reaching $1.21 billion, slightly below the anticipated $1.23 billion. Neil Ashe, the Chairman, President, and CEO of Acuity, expressed satisfaction with the results, citing growth in net sales, expanded adjusted operating profit, and increased adjusted diluted earnings per share. Despite the positive results, Acuity's shares experienced a minor 0.6% decline, settling at $360.70 on Thursday. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Investor rights law firm probes STAA, BTBD, CIO for securities law violations, fiduciary breaches. - approx. 96 characters.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, is looking into possible breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary responsibilities to shareholders involving several companies. This includes examining STAAR Surgical Company (NASDAQ: STAA).

data.title: Samsung Wallet partners with Coinbase for direct crypto purchases in Galaxy Wallet, benefiting 75M US users, with a global release ahead.
data.description: Samsung Wallet and Coinbase have partnered to make it easier for 75 million Galaxy users in the US to access cryptocurrency. This collaboration also includes plans for a global launch in the future.

data.title: OnePay, a bank app owned by Walmart, to offer Bitcoin and Ether trading & custody services this year to become a US superapp.
data.description: OnePay, a banking app supported by Walmart, is planning to introduce Bitcoin and Ether trading and custody services later in the year. The app aims to transform into a comprehensive US superapp akin to WeChat. This move signifies a strategic shift for OnePay, as it looks to expand its services and cater to users who are interested in cryptocurrencies. The addition of Bitcoin and Ether trading will provide users with new avenues for investment within the app.

data.title: Q3 saw 37% decrease in crypto hack losses to $509M; September had record million-dollar incidents from exchange and DeFi exploits.
data.description: In the third quarter, losses from crypto hacks decreased by 37%, totaling $509 million. However, September witnessed a notable increase in million-dollar incidents, with exchange and DeFi exploits leading the surge.
